## Checklist

- [ ] Backend tests pass (`python -m pytest tests -q`)
- [ ] Frontend tests pass (`npm test`)
- [ ] No honesty or safety test was weakened to make this pass
- [ ] Determinism impact stated below, or "none"
- [ ] Screenshot included, if the change is user-visible
- [ ] Relevant `docs/delivery/` record updated, if behaviour changed
